name: International Finance (Non-Specialist)
description: This module delivers an outlook of issues of international finance, such as parity conditions, currency exposures/management and international capital markets; especially focusing on the financial management of multinationals. The groundwork is based on fundamentals of finance which provides an introduction to the core principles of finance, valuation and financial decision-making, within the domestic setting and then expands to the international setting.

assessment.title: fully assess the whole syllabus and meet all the learning outcomes of the module
